Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.validation

Class CommonTextFormatValidator

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.validation.CommonTextFormatValidator
Direct Known Subclasses:
AAVSODownloadFormatValidator, SimpleTextFormatValidator
public class CommonTextFormatValidator extends Object
This class accepts a line of text for tokenising, validation, and ValidObservation instance creation that is common to all text format sources. Currently, simple and AAVSO download file formats have an intersecting set of mandatory and optional fields. The field indices differ across formats but the fieldIndexMap constructor argument caters for the differences.

  • Constructor Details

    • CommonTextFormatValidator

      public CommonTextFormatValidator(String desc, com.csvreader.CsvReader lineReader, int minFields, int maxFields, String valflagPatternStr, IFieldInfoSource fieldInfoSource) throws IOException
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      desc - A description of the kind of line we are validating.
      lineReader - The CsvReader that will be used to return fields, created with the appropriate delimiter and data source.
      minFields - The minimum number of fields permitted in an observation line.
      maxFields - The maximum number of fields permitted in an observation line.
      valflagPatternStr - A regex pattern representing the alternations of permitted valflags for this validator instance, e.g. COMMON_VALFLAG_PATTERN
      fieldInfoSource - A mapping from field name to field index that makes sense for the source.
      Throws:
      IOException

  • Method Details

    • next

      public boolean next() throws IOException
      Attempt to read the next record, returning whether it was.
      Returns:
      Whether the next record was read.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a read error occurred.

    • getRawRecord

      public String getRawRecord()
      Return the current raw record.
      Returns:
      The current raw record.

    • validate

      public ValidObservation validate() throws IOException, ObservationValidationError, ObservationValidationWarning
      Validate an observation line and either return a ValidObservation instance, or throw an exception indicating the error. Uncertainty, observer code, and valflag fields are optional. The uncertainty field may be present however, whether or not the magnitude field has a ":" (meaning 'uncertain') suffix.
      Parameters:
      line - The line of text to be tokenised and validated.
      Returns:
      The validated ValidObservation object or null if one could not be created from the current record's fields.
      Throws:
      IOException
      ObservationValidationError
      ObservationValidationWarning
